name: ck3-index
description: Semantic CK3 and Godherja index with FTS5 search, aggregated diagnostics, engine evidence, and coarse map context.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and review CK3 mod code semantically.
interface.longDescription: Adds all 36 ck3-index tools: semantic FTS5 search, inspection, review, references, aggregated diagnostics, engine datatypes and Scope evidence, localization/resources, and coarse map context.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use CK3 Index as the primary source of truth. Start with ck3_search, ck3_inspect, or ck3_review; use raw text search only for exact evidence paths.
